propGuard.helpTip: Set exposure limits per trading account. With auto-flatten on, the guard stops every live bot on an account the moment its concurrent live count exceeds the cap. Daily-loss and max-drawdown limits are recorded for account-level equity enforcement.
propGuard.delete.title: Delete rule
propGuard.delete.message: Delete the guard rule "{0}"? This stops protecting that account.
propFirm.delete.title: Delete challenge
propFirm.delete.message: Delete the challenge "{0}"? This permanently removes it and its equity history.
propFirm.detail.notFound: This challenge could not be found. It may have been deleted.
propRuleDialog.title: New rule
propRuleDialog.name: Rule name
compliance.erase.title: Erase my account
compliance.erase.message: This permanently erases your account and all associated data. This cannot be undone. Continue?
